goal: Add a review-only promotion gate for BPK-054 PR receipt evidence packs, deciding whether evidence may be promoted into release governance while still forbidding GitHub calls, PR creation, merge, writes, workflow changes, packages, and deployment.
scope_out: Do not read files, call GitHub, create PRs, merge, write files, change workflows, change package files, change deployment files, or mutate external state.
claims: Evidence promotion can be gated without merging.
Ready evidence pack and release-manager approval are required.
Merge and external actions remain false.
assumptions: Promotion feeds release governance review only.
dod: Ready, missing approval, and blocked pack cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Filesystem reads, GitHub calls, PR creation, merge, writes, workflow changes, package changes, deployment changes, or external state mutation become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-054 bundled PR receipt loader evidence review-only.
